Window Cleaning.name: Window Cleaning
Window Cleaning.description: Help Anna clean the livingroom window to get Love points
Window Cleaning.unlock: Unlocked automatically after entering the livingroom.
tips: Left click and drag to clean
Start at the top of the first window and shake your mouse through the dirty segments

Hacking with Sam.name: Hacking with Sam
Hacking with Sam.unlock: Unlocked after meeting Ken at his house. Go talk to her and tell her you want to learn.
tips: Complete the words. All are game names
The names are only missing vowels
You can either click the checkmark or press enter to submit the answer
Complete the minigame 5 times to attain the “Hacker” trait. This will be used for another quest

tips.title: View all Minigame Answers:
content: FLLT NW VGS = Fallout New Vegas
GRND THFT AT = Grand Theft Auto
GD F WR = God Of War
TH LST F S = The Last Of Us
MTL GR SLD = Metal Gear Solid
SPR MR SNSHN = Super Mario Sunshine
TH LGND F ZLD = The Legend of Zelda
G F MPRS = Age Of Empires
CLL F DTY = Call Of Duty

Spirit Hunt.name: Spirit Hunt
Spirit Hunt.description: Defend the World from Evil and Hot Spirits
Spirit Hunt.unlock: Unlocked after going to Evergreen, meeting Master Zhen, and agreeing to help him.
tips: Buy New/Better weapons from Zhen at the Temple
Buy the Golden Katana early for easy money
Use left click to attack the spirit
You can defend by holding right click over the attacking circles when almost filled
Hover over the lightning icon to power the blade. This will allow you to attack again instantly, and while the blade is powered you will auto block incoming attacks
Stay away from the red zones
Hover over the red crossed swords to get a buff

tips.title: Special Assistance if you have completed the character's quest
content: Himari - Blocks one attack every 8 seconds
Kate - Attacks the enemy every 8 seconds

squirt_racing.name: Squirt Racing
squirt_racing.description: High-stakes street racing where speed isn't the only thing that matters.
squirt_racing.unlock: Pay off your first $5,000 of debt and talk to Toni at the Garage.
tips: Shift at the green line for a perfect start.
Save your nitro for the final straightaway.
Upgrade your tires before challenging Jack.

poker_night.name: Poker Night
poker_night.description: Test your luck and your bluffing skills against the regulars at the Bar.
poker_night.unlock: Unlocked automatically after meeting Mario on Tuesday night.
tips: Watch Mario's eyes; he bluffs when he looks left.
Don't go all-in unless you have at least a Pair of Kings.
Losing to Sofia triggers a unique dialogue path.
